# revokeSession

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the revokeSession mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk revoke-session --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.sessionId <UUID>
```

## Examples

### Run revokeSession

csdk revoke-session --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.sessionId <UUID>
